title: 安德鲁
content_json: {"version":"0.0.1","children":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/ff3c4e85-1fa2-4e29-ab2f-0fc00b584e06.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/cccdb72f-c8f1-48e0-b2b5-653f3b288828.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.064c9353bc453","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"安德鲁"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者安德鲁，身份编码E01-052132，Re-A芯片状态稳定，未见异常波动。安德鲁是伊吉斯安全公司的安全顾问兼雇员教官，曾服役于E.O.S.特别行动队，看上去是一名典型到不能再典型的雇佣保镖。作为前特勤部队成员，安德鲁熟练掌握各种常见的武器，会根据雇主的需求采取不同的安保策略。但现在，他响应了协会的征召，协助超链者执行各种任务。只不过由于习惯，安德鲁至今仍穿看那身饱经风霜的战术护甲，并且从不摘下头盔一一恐怕根本没人知道他究竟长么样，每当提起他的时候，大家不约而同想到的都是那副护甲面具。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伊瑟E.O.S"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"si
